docket_entries.description: PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER BIANCO, MELISSA AS TO RESPONDENT SF ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL/BITE UNIT

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MELISSA BIANCO'S PETITION TO DETERMINE IF DOG IS POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS; VICIOUS, WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVED ANY ABUSE OF DISCRETION OR VIOLATION OF DUE PROCESS AND THE DECISION IS SUPPORTED NOT ONLY BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE BUT BY THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE AFTER INDEPENDENT REVIEW. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
AMENDED NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PETITIONER BIANCO, MELISSA

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. HE ALSO DISCLOSED ABOUT ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS IN THE PLEADING IS A FORMER PARTNER IN PRIVATE PRACTICE AND FAMILY FRIEND. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. PETITIONER MELISSA BIANCO'S HEARING ON PETITION TO DETERMINE IF DOG IS POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 13, 2010 FOR HEARING. PAPERS TO BE FILED BY MS. BIANCO IN SUPPORT OF HER PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE BY JANUARY 4, 2010 AND TO BE HAND SERVED TO THE CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE ON THE SAME DATE. RESPONSE TO BE FILED BY THE CITY ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 7, 2010. COURTESY COPIES TO BE LODGED IN DEPARTMENT 301. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-13-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO DETERMINE IF DOG IS POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS; VICIOUS; POS IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER BIANCO, MELISSA HEARING SET FOR DEC-18-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER BIANCO, MELISSA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

RESPONSE TO NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO DETERMINE IF DOG IS POTENTIALLY DANGEROUS OR VICIOUS; MEMO OF P&A; DECLARATRION OF MARGARET W. BAUMGARTNER IN SUPPORT OF SAME FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
